title: Ganesha Temple, Idagunji
tagline: Ganesha Temple, Idagunji — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: The Shri Idagunji Maha Ganapati Temple (ಇಡಗುಂಜಿ ಗಣಪತಿ) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Ganesha.
overview.description: The Shri Idagunji Maha Ganapati Temple (ಇಡಗುಂಜಿ ಗಣಪತಿ) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Ganesha. It is one of the religious destinations near Murudeshwara, it is located on the West Coast of India in the Idagunji town in Uttara Kannada district in Karnataka. The temple's popularity as a religious place is recorded by about 1 million devotees visiting it annually. It is one of the six Ganesha temples on the west coast of India, which is also called the "Ganesha Coast".

topPlaces.name: Kodlamane
topPlaces.description: Kodlamane is a Tirth Khestra and Hindu pilgrimage site in Honnavar Taluka of Uttara Kannada district in Karnataka state, India. It is the site of Kodlamane Shree Vishnumurthy Temple of Serenity and Mystery, an ancient well-preserved Tirth Kshetra.

topPlaces.name: Hospattan
topPlaces.description: Hospattan officially known as Hosapatna is a village near the bank of the river Sharavati in Honnavar taluk in the Uttara Kannada district of Karnataka state of India. Once the capital of Nawayath Sultanate and the former settlement of Nawayath community.

topPlaces.name: Sharavati Bridge
topPlaces.description: The Sharavati Bridge is a railway bridge, south of Honnavar, in the state of Karnataka, India, completed in 1994. It carries the Konkan Railway over the Sharavati river.

topPlaces.name: Apsarakonda
topPlaces.description: Apsarkonda is an emerging tourist village near Honnavar, in the district of Uttara Kannada, Karnataka, India. It is situated 8 km from the Honnavar bus stand.

topPlaces.name: Adukal
topPlaces.description: Adukal is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Honavar taluk of Uttara Kannada district.

topPlaces.name: Adkar
topPlaces.description: Adkar is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Honavar taluk of Uttara Kannada district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Chikkankod
topPlaces.description: Chikkankod is a village located in Honavar Tehsil of Uttara Kannada district in Karnataka, India. It is situated 13 km away from the sub-district headquarters Honnavar and 103 km away from the district headquarters Karwar.

topPlaces.name: Kasarkod
topPlaces.description: Kasarkod is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Honavar taluk of Uttara Kannada district in Karnataka.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ganesha Temple, Idagunji?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ganesha Temple, Idagunji is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ganesha Temple, Idagunji?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Hubli Airport (141 km) and the nearest railway station is Madgaon Junction (Goa) (129 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ganesha Temple, Idagunji?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ganesha Temple, Idagunji at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ganesha Temple, Idagunji?
faq.a: Stays in Ganesha Temple, Idagunji start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ganesha Temple, Idagunji?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kodlamane, Hospattan, Sharavati Bridge, Apsarakonda, Adukal.
